description:
h2. Epic Goal
*As a* user learning the platform,
*I want* an in-app help-guide system with consistent 'Beck map' route diagrams,
*so that* I can discover features by visual route rather than linear next-button reading, with a documented standard behind every guide.

h3. Scope
Help-Guide Standard + review audit + Beck-map design spec; standard applied to 30 real-content files; trial-claim corrections; Prev/Next removed; iframe cache-busting; emoji-escape fixes; equidistant 26px geometry; hover-grow accessibility; alternating labels; the becksmap CLI generator; YOU-ARE-HERE navigation guidance; 5 priority rewrites; SVG fixes; Trust Centre rename; audit-log guide; non-compliance guide.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the Standard + review, *when* applied, *then* the 30 real-content files match it and the becksmap CLI regenerates maps cleanly.
* *Given* any guide, *when* loaded, *then* it shows a Beck-map route with YOU-ARE-HERE guidance and no Prev/Next nav.

h3. Child Stories
* CRAN-275…CRAN-292

_As-built (Done). Story points + effort aggregate from child stories._

h3. User Story
*As a* documentation author,
*I want* a written Help-Guide Standard,
*so that* every guide follows one grammar for structure, route/station, voice and media.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* repo root, *then* {{docs/HELP-GUIDE-STANDARD.md}} exists.

h3. Implementation Notes
File structure, station/route grammar, voice, length, media rules.

h3. Sources
Session 51 standard commit.

h3. User Story
*As a* documentation author,
*I want* an audit of all 48 guides against the Standard,
*so that* I know which guides are compliant, which need fixing and which are stubs.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{docs/HELP-GUIDE-REVIEW.md}}, *then* it covers all 48 files.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
Session 51 review commit.

h3. User Story
*As a* documentation author,
*I want* a Beck-map design specification,
*so that* the 'tube map' route pattern is specified before guides adopt it.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{docs/BECK-MAP-DESIGN-SPEC.md}}, *then* it exists.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
Session 51 design-spec commit.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* the Standard applied to all 30 real-content guides,
*so that* the substantive guides are consistent and route-navigable.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* an audit, *then* 30 files match the Standard at HEAD.

h3. Implementation Notes
Remaining 18 are stubs (later work / CRAN-372).

h3. Sources
Session 51 application commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* over-claimed trial-feature statements corrected,
*so that* the guides describe only what actually shipped.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{grep -r "trial-period feature" frontend/public/help}}, *then* only expected matches remain.

h3. Implementation Notes
4 files + SEO meta-config.

h3. Sources
Session 51 trial-claims fix commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* Previous/Next navigation removed from all guides,
*so that* I discover content via the Beck map rather than next-button reading.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{grep -r "Previous" frontend/public/help}}, *then* no navigation usages remain.

h3. Implementation Notes
Navigation lives in the Beck map.

h3. Sources
Session 51 nav-removal commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* help-panel iframe cache-busting,
*so that* guide updates appear immediately without clearing my browser cache.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{HelpPanel.tsx}}, *then* it appends {{?v=<ts>}} to the iframe src.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
Session 51 cache-busting commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* broken emoji entity escapes fixed,
*so that* guides render emojis, not raw entity codes.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* any guide, *then* no raw HTML entity codes are visible.

h3. Implementation Notes
20 files fixed mechanically.

h3. Sources
Session 51 emoji-fix commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* equidistant Beck-map geometry across all guides,
*so that* route diagrams are visually coherent guide-to-guide.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* every Beck-map SVG, *then* it honours the 26-px row grid (becksmap regen check).

h3. Implementation Notes
Predictable interchange spacing.

h3. Sources
Session 51 geometry commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* low-vision / keyboard user,
*I want* a hover-grow effect on stations,
*so that* stations are more discoverable and keyboard focus has a clear visual handle.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a guide's CSS, *then* the hover-grow rule applies to station elements.

h3. Implementation Notes
Accessibility improvement.

h3. Sources
Session 51 accessibility commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* alternating, collision-free station labels,
*so that* labels never overlap, including at interchanges and feeders.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* any guide, *then* labels don't collide (visual + becksmap regen check).

h3. Implementation Notes
Above/below alternation; fixed-side interchange rule; edge-aware feeders.

h3. Sources
Session 51 label-position commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* documentation author,
*I want* a becksmap CLI that generates maps from JSON,
*so that* I can author/regenerate Beck maps deterministically from a definition.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{node tools/becksmap/index.js examples/ch4_05.json}}, *then* it regenerates the ch4_05 SVG cleanly.

h3. Implementation Notes
CLI at {{tools/becksmap/}} with examples.

h3. Sources
Session 51 becksmap-CLI commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user deep-linked into a guide,
*I want* a YOU-ARE-HERE arrow and a dismissible hint banner,
*so that* I instantly see where I am on the route and how to read the map.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* a guide loaded at a deep-linked station, *then* the YOU-ARE-HERE arrow renders (opposite the label).
* *Given* the hint banner, *then* it is dismissible with localStorage state.

h3. Implementation Notes
Via {{panel-overrides.css}} + {{HelpPanel.tsx}} injection — works on all 48 files without regeneration; {{paint-order: stroke}} label backgrounds.

h3. Sources
Session 59 navigation-guidance commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* the five highest-priority stub guides fully rewritten,
*so that* the most important features have complete, route-based guidance.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the 5 guides, *then* each renders with its full Beck-map route.

h3. Implementation Notes
ch4_05 Batch Fill / ch4_06 Copilot / ch4_07 Risk Assessment / ch6_05 Incident Lifecycle / ch5_06 Compliance Vault; JSON defs added to becksmap examples.

h3. Sources
Session 54 + 58 rewrites.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* SVG fixes on two guides,
*so that* ch4_02 and ch1_03 render without label collisions or disconnected lines.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* both guides, *then* no label collisions / disconnected polylines.

h3. Implementation Notes
ch4_02 terminus label moved; ch1_03 OAuth+PAT polylines extended to 'Connected'.

h3. Sources
Session 54 SVG-fix commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* the marketplace help guide renamed to trust_centre,
*so that* the help guide matches the Trust Centre rebrand.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{frontend/public/help/}}, *then* {{ch7_09_trust_centre.html}} exists.
* *Given* {{HelpPanelContext}}, *then* it maps the Trust Centre route to the new file.

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
Session 60 Trust Centre rename commits.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* an audit-log help guide with a corrected route mapping,
*so that* the audit-log page has proper in-app guidance.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* {{ch7_11_audit_log.html}}, *then* it exists with 6 stations.
* *Given* {{HelpPanelContext}}, *then* it maps the audit-log route to ch7_11 (was incorrectly ch5_05).

h3. Implementation Notes


h3. Sources
Session 57 audit-log help-guide commit.

h3. User Story
*As a* user,
*I want* a guide on reporting non-compliance under CRA,
*so that* I understand how to report non-compliance.

h3. Acceptance Criteria
* *Given* the help-guide route, *then* the non-compliance reporting guide renders in-app.

h3. Implementation Notes
Originally standalone feature #56; now a help-guide entry.

h3. Sources
#56 commits.
